message:
feat(browser): add sql.js and DuckDB WASM comparison benchmarks

- Export initSqlJs for sql.js-compatible API
- Add browser-comparison-benchmark.spec.js for automated benchmarks
- Configure Playwright with CORS disabled for CDN worker loading
- Update test paths to use /examples/wasm/ base URL
- All 223 browser tests passing

LanceQL vs sql.js (1K rows):
- Insert: 6.3x faster
- SELECT *: 8.5x faster
- WHERE: 2.5x faster
- ORDER BY + LIMIT: 4.0x faster

LanceQL vs DuckDB WASM (1K rows):
- Simple SELECT: 3.2x faster
- Aggregation: tie
- JOIN: DuckDB 26x faster (optimized hash join)
